official_sources.surface: Mango group accounts and OpenBook market accounts
official_sources.evidence: Mango group state can reference spot/OpenBook markets, but this adapter only records Mango group, perp market and MangoAccount source boundaries.

runtime_isolation: Do not treat OpenBook account sources as shared spot runtime until market, book-side, event queue and MangoAccount ownership decoding are audited.

decode OpenBook market, bids, asks and event queue accounts
